new_value: Already shipped in v0.6.1 (Cursor dispatch support)
Circuit breaker state not exposed in gt status --json. Cannot implement until upstream adds the field. Monitoring.
MQ pre-verification not exposed per-convoy in gt JSON output. Only rig-level MQ state available. Monitoring.
Gas Town has no OTel/telemetry CLI export. Costs, vitals, and events already cover operational visibility. Not feasible.
